name: King of the Hill - Mountaintop Battle

reviews.review_description: Do not get this game because it is boring

This game does not have enough love. This is one of the most refreshing game I’ve played in a WHILE. and i’m not trying to be over dramatic for a review I just really like this game. Is barely has any reviews or plays and that is just sad. This game is so fun. Like it’s free and you really get a workout. It has the addictive loop of how long can you survive with the fun physics. I mean the green rock make you earn your punch. And the ability to customize your size is great. Only problem is I don’t think there’s any way to move except for in real life but that might be intentional. Anyway you really should get this game. Boost the popularity! This game deserves it.
It just is to low and there's nothing I can do to fix this just plz make so i can play
